name: Voice Kick
description: Kick a user from their current voice channel.
author: Kiodium

defaults.successMessage:
{targetMention} was kicked from voice by {mention}.
Reason: {reason}
defaults.permissionMessage: You need Move Members permission to voice kick users.
defaults.botPermissionMessage: I need Move Members permission to voice kick users.
defaults.notInVoiceMessage: {targetMention} is not connected to a voice channel.
